steps.t: Newly-crafted arrows can be found in a barrel near Boradan's forge in Tingobel. Boradan has asked you to collect his newly-crafted arrows and deliver …
Bowmen can be found throughout Tingobel in the Blackroot Vale. You have collected the newly-crafted arrows from Boradan. You should deliver them to th…
Boradan can be found in Tingobel. You have delivered the arrows to the bowmen in Tingobel. You should return to Boradan.
